title: StartExportTaskRequest
description: StartExportTaskRequest schema from Amazon Application Discovery Service API

exportDataFormat.description: The file format for the returned export data. Default(s) are CSV. Note: The GRAPHML option has been deprecated.

name.description: A single ExportFilter name. Supported filters — agentIds.

values.description: A single agent ID for a Discovery Agent. An agent ID can be found using the DescribeAgents action.

filters.description: If a filter is present, it selects the single agentId of the Application Discovery Agent for which data is exported.

startTime.description: The start timestamp for exported data from the single Application Discovery Agent selected in the filters.

endTime.description: The end timestamp for exported data from the single Application Discovery Agent selected in the filters.

preferences.description: Indicates the type of agent export.
